name: Dijet Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Dijet Industrial Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of cemented carbide tools worldwide. It offers tuff modular system, drill, indexable and solid end mill, face mill, coated and non-coated inserts, sintered CBN and diamond inserts, cermet inserts, and wear and impact resistant tool products. The company was formerly known as Hyakunen Industrial Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Dijet Industrial Co., Ltd. in June 1954. Dijet Industrial Co., Ltd. was founded in 1938 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
